info.title: SKU.io — Connect to SKU.io
info.description: The entry point for any SKU.io task. First establish which tenant you are working in (`https://{tenant}.sku.io`) — ask for it if it was not given — then authenticate with a Personal Access Token sent as a Bearer token and verify it with a cheap identity call. Use this first whenever you are about to call the SKU.io API.

get.summary: Return the authenticated user and the tenant the token resolved to (tenant_id / tenant_name). Cheapest way to verify a token works and that you are on the right tenant.
